Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: We transform a Chevy C-1500 into a pro-touring sport truck.
Video.title: Pro Touring Sport Truck

Video.summary: A ’65 Chevy C10 Fleetside takes on a whole new life!
Video.title: Chevy C10 Fleetside Lo N Slo

Image.alt: Chevy C10 Fleetside Lo N Slo
Chevy C10 Fleetside Lo N Slo
Chevy C10 Fleetside Lo N Slo

Video.summary: We turbocharge a bone stock Big Block Ford on the cheap.
Video.title: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie upgrade internal components to make our blue oval beast more durable under boost.
Video.title: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: A new project is started: transforming a 1970 Camaro RS into a stock-style RS/SS 396.
Video.title: Project Limelight Debut

Video.summary: Learn how to fix old sheetmetal repairs and rust spots as Rick and Tommy work on the 1970 Camaro.
Video.title: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Image.alt: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Video.summary: Project Limelight turns green, how to paint stripes over clear, and how to refurbish stock wheels.
Video.title: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Image.alt: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Project Bullseye gets a power upgrade, brakes, steering, painted scooped hood, and Swinger stripe.
Video.title: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Image.alt: Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop
Mopar Big Block and Transmission Drop

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.

Video.summary: Transforming a junkyard Ford flathead into a classic hot rod V8.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Image.alt: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Brian and Jason have 48 hours to finish Project Budget Baller's audio and wheel upgrades.
Video.title: Final 48 Hour Fixes

Video.summary: Our retro 1949 Chevy 3100 will end up with a great new look and Chevy's vintage straight six.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 1
